case_title: IRIS Y RAMIREZ VS. BEDROOM OUTLET

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM QUEENA HO FILED BY RAMIREZ, IRIS Y BEDROOM OUTLET
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-01-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RAMIREZ, IRIS Y RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BEDROOM OUTLET $250.00 PRINCIPAL, $61.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $311.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,200.00 FILED BY RAMIREZ, IRIS Y AS TO DEFENDANT BEDROOM OUTLET ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-01-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF RAMIREZ, IRIS Y

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-01-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-01-2008 BY JUDGE PRO TEM QUEENA HO. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
